title: eriosema procumbens
intro: Eriosema procumbens, also known as the spreading eriosema, is a shrub-like plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriosema procumbens include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the roots and leaves to create a decoction, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
